title: Lemma 2.6 / eq self-pairing: justify |v*|^2 = tau_e/tau and projection of e equals v*

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body:
Two supporting facts in Lemma 2.6 are stated without full derivation:
(1) The projection of the apex edge e in C_1(G) onto Cut(G)^* = L(T)^* is exactly the dual basis element v*.
(2) Its square-flux F_{A,B}(e) is 1 if A ∪ B ∪ e is a spanning tree of G and 0 otherwise, whence by Lemma 2.3, |v*|^2 = tau_e/tau, where tau_e counts spanning trees containing e.

Also needed: the restriction map C_1(G) -> Cut(G)^* SURJECTS (used to lift a to x = x_C + x_F). This is the primitivity of Cut(G) in the self-dual lattice C_1(G) (Greene 2013, Prop. 3.1); cite it and verify G is connected (true: T connected, apex joined to v).
Each of (1),(2) and the surjectivity must be written out, not asserted.
